notes: Adds Bolete Filter / Western Pennsylvania Mushroom Club edible-use and regional support for six source-ready porcini/Tylopilus edible bolete records.

Normalizes stale source-review notes on boletus-atkinsonii, boletus-auripes, boletus-variipes-fagicola, boletus-separans, noble-bolete, and tylopilus-badiceps while retaining expert-ID and caution framing.

Keeps source-blocked records such as almost-bluing-king-bolete, xerocomus-subtomentosus, porphyrellus-porphyrosporus, gyroporus-borealis-smithii, tylopilus-peralbidus, and tylopilus-tabacinus unchanged.
Does not promote tylopilus-ferrugineus or indecisus-bolete; those remain supervisor/policy decisions for a future mild-Tylopilus pass.
No route/classifier code or image fields changed in this package.
